violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
